description: LLM-assisted biomedical literature screening and extraction for PubMed, GEO, and preprints.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.rachadele/biolit

environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key (required when using the default Anthropic provider)
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key (required when using LLM_PROVIDER=openai)
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: LLM provider: anthropic (default), openai, or ollama
environmentVariables.name: LLM_PROVIDER

environmentVariables.description: Semantic Scholar API key for higher rate limits on citation lookup (optional)
environmentVariables.name: SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Email address for Unpaywall API access to improve PDF retrieval (optional)
environmentVariables.name: UNPAYWALL_EMAIL
